note: CulturePGH map data. Add local and immigrant-owned businesses here. lat/lng are approximate — correct them by right-clicking the spot in Google Maps and copying the coordinates. category drives the marker color: 'restaurant', 'market', or 'cafe'.

places.name: Gaucho Parrilla Argentina

places.blurb: Family-owned Mexican grocer and taqueria since 1998.
